deniedGlobals.event: Use an explicit event parameter instead of relying on the global event object.
deniedGlobals.location: Use an explicit navigation or URL abstraction instead of the global location object.
deniedGlobals.history: Use a routing/navigation abstraction instead of the global history object.
deniedGlobals.name: Avoid relying on the implicit global name binding.
deniedGlobals.top: Avoid referencing the global top window directly.
deniedGlobals.self: Avoid referencing the global self directly when a local reference is clearer.
